allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\); const heartIcons = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('heart'\)\); const shieldIcons = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('shield'\)\); const giftIcons = names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('gift'\)\); console.log\('HEART:', heartIcons.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('SHIELD:', shieldIcons.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('GIFT:', giftIcons.join\(', '\)\);")
